name: Volition Elicitation: Operational Semantics for People and Their Machines

description: arXiv:2607.14138v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The most prevalent distributed systems today include people and their personal machines (smartphones). In such systems, computations are driven by people's volitions: a payment when a person wishes to pay someone, befriending when two people wish to become friends, etc. Volition-Guarded Multiagent Atomic Transactions were proposed as an abstract...
author: Ehud Shapiro
